name: Fleet Compliance Officers managing 20-50 vehicles tool
description: For Fleet Compliance Officers managing 20-50 vehicles, inefficient tracking of inspection compliance causes potential fines and operational delays. We provide automated compliance reporting instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and paper records.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking vehicle inspection compliance
features: Basic reporting dashboard for compliance status
